Paszteciki
Potato Pies

Dough ingredients:
- 2 cups flour
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup water
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons vegetable oil

Filling ingredients:
- 2 lbs potatoes
- 4 oz ground mushrooms
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 medium onion, minced
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 1/4 cup sour cream

Instructions:

For dough:
Mix flour, egg, water, salt and oil until smooth.
Knead for 5 minutes until elastic.
Let rest covered for 20 minutes.

For filling:
Boil potatoes until tender, peel and mash.
Sauté mushrooms and onion in butter until soft.
Mix mushrooms with mashed potatoes.
Season with salt, pepper and sour cream.

Assembly:
Roll dough thin and cut into 2 inch squares.
Place spoonful of filling on each square.
Fold into triangle and press edges firmly.
Boil in salted water until they float plus 2 minutes.
Or pan-fry in butter until golden.

Serving: Serve hot with sour cream and crispy onions.

Prep time: 40 minutes
Cooking time: 30 minutes
Yields: about 30 pieces
